claude_review.accepted_caveat: Mechanic gates prove the models compute correctly and reproducibly; they do not prove current skill values are already balanced. Real-roster F5 and T2.1 still need to prove campaign balance.

purpose: Milestone note to surface to Marcelo before drafting Campaign Journey Bundle V0.
what_is_proven: the intended generic-job roster and replacement jobs are defined
Mime is replaced by Special Knight
Bard/Dancer gender restriction is preserved only for job access, with reaction/support/movement parity
the key mechanic validation gates exist and have been accepted as reproducible models with dual-independent checks and zero-row mismatch
the mechanic gates do not by themselves prove that current skill values are balanced; real-roster F5 and T2.1 still have to prove that
concrete-provisional values exist for the highest formula-sensitive caster, performer, and dark-state clusters
the campaign readiness map names the exact remaining producer steps and risk priorities
highest_current_risks: Belief x Oil x fire-weak area compound
Mitigation and early physical full-package builds
Late-job and final Ramza replacement pressure

steering_options.name: Draft W2 Campaign Journey Bundle V0
steering_options.when_to_choose: Priority is seeing the campaign as a player journey immediately.

steering_options.name: Start W3 physical/foundation concrete values
steering_options.when_to_choose: Priority is reducing unknowns before deeper journey ceiling rows.

steering_options.name: Build W3 A2 prerequisite/JP/equipment ledger
steering_options.when_to_choose: Priority is early power pacing and anti-overgrind/anti-rush proof.

steering_options.name: Push T1/formula-v1 on Windows
steering_options.when_to_choose: Windows environment is available and final numeric acceptance is the bottleneck.

recommended_user_facing_message_pt_br: Chegamos num marco importante: o roster de design dos jobs esta fechado, os principais clusters caster/performer/dark-state tem valores concrete-provisional aceitos, e o mapa de readiness da validacao de campanha foi aprovado pelo Claude. Isso ainda nao significa que a campanha esta validada. Os gates provam que os modelos estao corretos e reproduziveis, nao que os numeros ja estao balanceados. O que falta agora e provar a progressao real com 4 generics + Ramza: unlocks, JP, equipamentos, builds cross-job, RSM e F5 em roster real. Proximo passo recomendado: criar o W2 Campaign Journey Bundle V0, com linhas por fase da campanha para P0/P1/P5 e wall tests. Alternativas seriam priorizar primeiro os valores concretos dos jobs fisicos/foundation, o ledger de JP/equipamentos, ou o dump T1/formula-v1 no Windows.
claude_review_request: Is the milestone summary faithful to doc 47?
Do the proven/not-proven sections avoid overclaiming?
Are options A-D the right steering options for Marcelo?
Is the recommended user-facing message accurate enough to send before W2?
